description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by a well-manicured lawn and a perimeter of hedges and trees. The structure features a flat roof and a rectangular layout, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open to the garden and pool area. The house includes a driveway and garage, visible from the front, and a spacious backyard with a swimming pool. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored plaster, wood paneling, and glass, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The landscaping is minimalistic, with evenly spaced conifer trees and a few larger deciduous trees for shade. The property is enclosed by a low hedge, providing privacy while maintaining an open, inviting feel.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist garden featuring a pool and perimeter hedges. The exterior combines light plaster, wood, and glass for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a large tree on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, and extensive glass doors opening to the garden.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the lawn, perimeter hedges, and a large tree on the right.
description_view_3: Alternate front view with two large trees, the main entrance, and a broad view of the front garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, and is flanked by large windows and a driveway leading to the garage.
